requirement_topic.en: BESS Fire Safety Installation — Mozambique Local Fire Authority and Building Authority Requirements
requirement_topic.zh: BESS消防安全安装——莫桑比克当地消防主管机关和建筑主管机关要求
requirement_topic.zht: BESS消防安全安裝——莫三比克當地消防主管機關和建築主管機關要求

summary.en: Mozambique does not have a confirmed standalone national mandatory BESS fire safety installation standard equivalent to NFPA 855 as of the dataset date. Fire safety for commercial and industrial facilities in Mozambique is governed by local fire authority and municipal building authority requirements, which are administered at the provincial and municipal level. A dedicated national fire code specifically for stationary BESS has not been confirmed from official Mozambican sources. In practice, donor-funded and IPP BESS projects in Mozambique follow the fire safety requirements specified by the project owner and lenders, which typically reference IEC 62933-5-2 (Safety Requirements for Electrochemical-based Energy Storage Systems) and may reference NFPA 855 or IEC 62933-5-1 as design guidance. Building permit approval from the relevant municipal authority (Conselho Municipal) is required for fixed installations. IEC 62619 addresses cell and module safety including abuse testing relevant to fire prevention at the unit level. Note: Mozambique's fire safety regulatory framework for BESS is at an early stage and requirements are thin and project-specific; this is an area of significant regulatory uncertainty.
summary.zh: 截至本数据集日期，莫桑比克尚无经确认的独立国家强制性BESS消防安全安装标准，与NFPA 855相当。莫桑比克商业及工业设施的消防安全由当地消防主管机关和市政建筑主管机关要求管控，在省级和市级层面执行。专门针对固定式BESS的国家消防规范尚未从莫桑比克官方来源得到确认。实际上，莫桑比克捐赠方资助和IPP BESS项目遵循项目业主和贷款方规定的消防安全要求，通常引用IEC 62933-5-2（电化学储能系统安全要求），并可能引用NFPA 855或IEC 62933-5-1作为设计指导。固定装置须取得相关市政主管机关（市议会）的建筑许可批准。IEC 62619涉及电芯和模组安全，包括与单元级防火相关的滥用测试。注：莫桑比克BESS消防安全监管框架处于早期阶段，要求薄弱且以项目为主导；这是一个存在重大监管不确定性的领域。
summary.zht: 截至本數據集日期，莫三比克尚無經確認的獨立國家強制性BESS消防安全安裝標準，與NFPA 855相當。莫三比克商業及工業設施的消防安全由當地消防主管機關和市政建築主管機關要求管控，在省級和市級層面執行。專門針對固定式BESS的國家消防規範尚未從莫三比克官方來源得到確認。實際上，莫三比克捐贈方資助和IPP BESS項目遵循項目業主和貸款方規定的消防安全要求，通常引用IEC 62933-5-2（電化學儲能系統安全要求），並可能引用NFPA 855或IEC 62933-5-1作為設計指導。固定裝置須取得相關市政主管機關（市議會）的建築許可批准。IEC 62619涉及電芯和模組安全，包括與單元級防火相關的濫用測試。注：莫三比克BESS消防安全監管框架處於早期階段，要求薄弱且以項目為主導；這是一個存在重大監管不確定性的領域。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62933-5-2 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements — Electrochemical-based systems (typically referenced in donor and IPP project specifications for Mozambique BESS projects)
IEC 62933-5-1:2024 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety considerations — Hazard identification, risk assessment and risk mitigation (design guidance referenced in project specifications)
IEC 62619:2022 — Safety Requirements for Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries for Use in Industrial Applications (cell/module safety including abuse testing relevant to fire prevention)

Local fire authority and Conselho Municipal (municipal council) — building permit and fire safety approval required for fixed commercial/industrial BESS installations; requirements vary by municipality
NFPA 855 — Standard for the Installation of Stationary Energy Storage Systems (not confirmed as formally adopted in Mozambique; may be referenced in donor/lender project specifications)

summary.en: China manages BESS fire safety under a combination of mandatory standards and project-level fire-safety review. GB 44240-2024 includes fire-safety provisions for BESS cells and modules. GB/T 36276-2023 and GB/T 36558-2023 cover system-level safety including fire-related requirements. Project-level fire-safety review in China is governed by local fire authority approval procedures. These Chinese fire-safety standards and domestic approval procedures are not recognised in Mozambique as meeting project-owner, donor, or lender fire-safety requirements. BESS fire-safety evidence prepared under Chinese standards must be supplemented with IEC 62933-5-2-aligned documentation for Mozambique project review.
summary.zh: 中国通过强制性标准和项目级消防审查相结合的方式管理BESS消防安全。GB 44240-2024包含BESS电芯和模组的消防安全规定。GB/T 36276-2023和GB/T 36558-2023覆盖包括消防相关要求在内的系统级安全。中国的项目级消防审查由地方消防主管机关审批程序管控。上述中国消防安全标准和国内审批程序在莫桑比克不被认可为满足项目业主、捐赠方或贷款方消防安全要求。依据中国标准准备的BESS消防安全证据，须在莫桑比克项目审查中补充符合IEC 62933-5-2要求的文件。
summary.zht: 中國通過強制性標準和項目級消防審查相結合的方式管理BESS消防安全。GB 44240-2024包含BESS電芯和模組的消防安全規定。GB/T 36276-2023和GB/T 36558-2023覆蓋包括消防相關要求在內的系統級安全。中國的項目級消防審查由地方消防主管機關審批程序管控。上述中國消防安全標準和國內審批程序在莫三比克不被認可為滿足項目業主、捐贈方或貸款方消防安全要求。依據中國標準準備的BESS消防安全證據，須在莫三比克項目審查中補充符合IEC 62933-5-2要求的文件。

standards_or_laws: GB 44240-2024 — 电化学储能系统用二次锂电池安全要求 (includes fire-safety provisions for BESS cells/modules; mandatory, effective August 1, 2025)
GB/T 36558-2023 — 电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件 (General Technical Requirements for Electrochemical Energy Storage Systems in Power Systems)

gap.en: Gap: Mozambique does not have a confirmed standalone national mandatory BESS fire safety code as of the dataset date; this is an area of significant regulatory uncertainty. Chinese GB-standard fire safety documentation does not satisfy donor, lender, or project-owner fire safety requirements for Mozambique BESS projects. Exporters and project teams should: (a) confirm fire safety requirements directly with the project owner, lead lender (World Bank, AfDB, or other), and the relevant local fire authority and municipal building authority before design is finalised; (b) prepare BESS fire-safety design documentation aligned with IEC 62933-5-2 and, where referenced by the project, NFPA 855 — including thermal-runaway propagation mitigation, gas detection or ventilation design, suppression system design, emergency shutdown procedures, and separation distances; (c) obtain IEC 62619 type-test evidence for cells and modules to demonstrate cell-level safety including abuse testing; (d) engage a fire protection engineer with experience in sub-Saharan Africa BESS or energy projects for design review; (e) apply for building permit from the relevant Conselho Municipal (municipal council) for fixed installations.
gap.zh: 差距：截至本数据集日期，莫桑比克尚无经确认的独立国家强制性BESS消防安全规范；这是一个存在重大监管不确定性的领域。依据GB标准编制的中国BESS消防安全文件不满足莫桑比克BESS项目捐赠方、贷款方或项目业主的消防安全要求。出口商和项目团队应：（a）在设计最终确定前直接向项目业主、牵头贷款方（世界银行、非洲开发银行或其他机构）及相关当地消防主管机关和市政建筑主管机关确认消防安全要求；（b）准备符合IEC 62933-5-2及项目引用NFPA 855要求的BESS消防安全设计文件——包括热失控蔓延缓解、气体探测或通风设计、抑制系统设计、紧急停机程序及隔离距离；（c）为电芯和模组取得IEC 62619型式试验证据，证明电芯级安全性（包括滥用测试）；（d）聘请具有撒哈拉以南非洲BESS或能源项目经验的消防工程师进行设计审查；（e）为固定装置向相关市议会申请建筑许可。
gap.zht: 差距：截至本數據集日期，莫三比克尚無經確認的獨立國家強制性BESS消防安全規範；這是一個存在重大監管不確定性的領域。依據GB標準編制的中國BESS消防安全文件不滿足莫三比克BESS項目捐贈方、貸款方或項目業主的消防安全要求。出口商和項目團隊應：（a）在設計最終確定前直接向項目業主、牽頭貸款方（世界銀行、非洲開發銀行或其他機構）及相關當地消防主管機關和市政建築主管機關確認消防安全要求；（b）準備符合IEC 62933-5-2及項目引用NFPA 855要求的BESS消防安全設計文件——包括熱失控蔓延緩解、氣體探測或通風設計、抑制系統設計、緊急停機程序及隔離距離；（c）為電芯和模組取得IEC 62619型式試驗證據，證明電芯級安全性（包括濫用測試）；（d）聘請具有撒哈拉以南非洲BESS或能源項目經驗的消防工程師進行設計審查；（e）為固定裝置向相關市議會申請建築許可。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory at municipal level — building permit from Conselho Municipal required for fixed installations; dedicated national BESS fire safety standard not confirmed as of dataset date; fire safety requirements for BESS projects are primarily set by project owners and donors/lenders referencing IEC 62933-5-2
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory or project-specific depending on Chinese project approval, installation type, and local fire authority requirements

source.publisher: INNOQ (Instituto Nacional de Normalização e Qualidade) — Mozambique National Standards and Quality Institute

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] No confirmed standalone national mandatory BESS fire safety standard has been identified for Mozambique as of the dataset date — this is a significant regulatory gap and an area of high uncertainty. Chinese GB-standard fire safety documentation does not satisfy donor, lender, or project-owner requirements for Mozambique BESS projects. Engage the project owner, lead lender, local fire authority, and the relevant Conselho Municipal at the earliest project stage to determine applicable fire safety requirements. Prepare IEC 62933-5-2-aligned fire safety documentation and obtain IEC 62619 cell/module type-test evidence before committing to equipment specification or layout.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 截至本数据集日期，莫桑比克尚无经确认的独立国家强制性BESS消防安全标准——这是一个重大监管空白和高度不确定性领域。中国GB标准消防安全文件不满足莫桑比克BESS项目捐赠方、贷款方或项目业主的要求。应在项目最早阶段与项目业主、牵头贷款方、当地消防主管机关及相关市议会接触，确定适用消防安全要求。在确定设备规格或布局前，准备符合IEC 62933-5-2要求的消防安全文件并取得IEC 62619电芯/模组型式试验证据。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 截至本數據集日期，莫三比克尚無經確認的獨立國家強制性BESS消防安全標準——這是一個重大監管空白和高度不確定性領域。中國GB標準消防安全文件不滿足莫三比克BESS項目捐贈方、貸款方或項目業主的要求。應在項目最早階段與項目業主、牽頭貸款方、當地消防主管機關及相關市議會接觸，確定適用消防安全要求。在確定設備規格或布局前，準備符合IEC 62933-5-2要求的消防安全文件並取得IEC 62619電芯/模組型式試驗證據。
